SYSTEMS

Systems, not industries.

We build decision infrastructure where dynamics matter.

Security Systems
Orchestrate safety as a system state across environments. Simulate hazards. Execute response.
Risk detection and early warning from multi-source signalsReal-time monitoring and system integration across sitesHazard scenario simulation and end-to-end safety optimization
Explore →
Financial Systems
Model information-driven dynamics across coupled networks. Stress scenarios. Trace decisions.
Network risk and contagion modelingScenario-driven allocation under constraintsDecision provenance and auditability
Explore →
Biological Systems
Reconstruct hidden state in living dynamics. Simulate transitions. Evaluate interventions.
Mechanistic models with uncertainty boundsCounterfactual intervention simulationState estimation from sparse observations
Explore →
Supply Systems
Operate end-to-end flow under constraints. Simulate disruption. Reconfigure the network.
Digital twin of flows and constraintsStress-tested plans under disruptionSystem-level optimization across nodes
Explore →
Public Systems
Model public environments as coupled dynamics. Test interventions. Govern outcomes.
Policy simulation with traceabilityOptimization of allocation tradeoffsGovernance-ready decision records
Explore →
